g.text: Sparse Set Layout: Indirection Prevents SIMD

div.p:
Data layout enables compiler optimizations that code changes cannot achieve. Archetype's parallel arrays give the compiler: • Proven sequential access → loop unrolling • No pointer aliasing → SIMD vectorization
• Known stride → prefetching Sparse set indirection blocks all of these.

text.tspan: // 4 ops per entity: 2 loads, 1 mul, 1 add
// 4 ops per entity: 2 loads, 1 mul, 1 add

g.text: mov eax, [sparse + rdi*4] ; lookup dense idx
vmulps ymm1, ymm1, ymm2 ; 8 × vel.dx * dt
vmulps ymm1, ymm1, ymm2 ; 8 × vel.dy * dt
